result.text:
Encounter seed.

Environment:
Wind-carved mountains where nomadic human clans and Highland Uruk share the land. Stone circles, ritual tattoos, and ancestral memory define a harsh but spiritual landscape.

What the party first notices:
one herd has returned without its keepers.

Who or what is involved:
a clan messenger who arrived too late.

What is actually happening:
an old oath between kin groups has finally broken.

Complication:
the wind omens are contradictory and everyone sees what they want.

GM Hook:
travel to a sacred height and learn what changed there.

STYLE:
painted british comic encounter illustration, gritty graphic novel action scene, heavy ink outlines, thick painterly brush strokes, high contrast saturated colors, dramatic composition, immediate tension, layered action, dark fantasy encounter art.
